title: Junior Instructional Designer at Teach For India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Teach For India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Teach For India Ventures Solutions family as a Instructional Designer in Kanpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Teach For India Ventures Solutions:
Teach For India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India Ventures Solutions!
